title: NewHome
body:
## 🏡 NewHome
**NewHome** is a lightweight and straightforward home management plugin designed for simplicity and ease of use. Perfect for servers that want basic teleportation features without the clutter of complex configurations.
### ⚙️ Available Commands:
- /sethome — Set your home at your current location.
- /home — Teleport back to your saved home.
- /listhome — View a list of your saved homes.
- /delhome — Delete a previously set home.
### ✅ Compatibility:
Recommended for **Minecraft version 1.21.1**
